docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, LESTER AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, NANCY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 610.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-26-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, NANCY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-23-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-23-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $80.00) SERVED NOV-26-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, NANCY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-23-2008 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN'S MOTION TO FEB-25-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THIS CASE IS NOT SUITABLE FOR TRANSFER TO SUPERIOR COURT FOR CONSOLIDATION WITH ACTION NO. 478822. THE CLERK SHALL SET THIS CASE FOR HEARING FOR FURTHER EVIDENCE ON THE MERITS OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND NOTIFY THE PARTIES. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS SHALL BE RETAINED IN THE COURT FILE. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2009 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2009 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO MAY-13-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE IN DEPT. 610. PARTIES TO REPORT TO DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS FROM PREVIOUS HEARING RETAINED IN COURT FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOW, LESTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIN, NANCY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,901.08 FILED BY CHOW, LESTER AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, NANCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-23-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2009 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-29-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE PARTIES SHALL SUBMIT TO JUDICIAL ARBITRATION IN THE SUPERIOR COURT CASE NO. 478822. THE PARTIES SHALL RETURN TO THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT FOR FURTHER HEARING AT WHICH THE COURT WILL APPLY THE ARBITRATOR'S ASSESSMENT OF LIABILITY, AND HEAR EVIDENCE FROM THE PARTIES CONCERNING PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR DAMAGES. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED IN THE COURT FILE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
